title: Total DDS Employees by State, FY2010–FY2023
description: Long-format (tidy) table of total Disability Determination Services (DDS) employee counts by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) and federal fiscal year, FY2010–FY2023. Single metric: total_dds_employees. Extracted from the SSA source workbook into a tidy long format.

columns.name: rows[].code
columns.description: Scope code: e.g. 'Grand Total' (national), SSA region, or state code/name.

columns.name: rows[].value
columns.description: Total DDS employee count for the scope/year.

geographic_coverage: National, SSA regions, and individual states
notes: Authoritative: derived 1:1 from dds-employees-by-state-fy2010-2023.source.xlsx into tidy long format (SSA-published staffing counts, not recomputed). Top-level keys: schema='long', metric_family='total_dds_employees_by_state', source_file, extracted_at (2026-05-08), fy_range=[2010,2023], rows. National 'code' value is 'Grand Total'. Column dot-paths denote fields of each rows[] object. Per methodology.md, SSA SAOR-style FTE counts may differ from CTHRU payroll headcounts. Source URL is SSA's canonical disability-data page; exact source-workbook deep link not recorded in the file.
